healthcareProviderId.title: healthcareProviderId
healthcareProviderId.description: Salesforce record Id of the Healthcare Provider. Used as fallback when unique code is not provided.

healthcareProviderName.title: healthcareProviderName
healthcareProviderName.description: Name of the Healthcare Provider. Used as fallback when unique code and provider Id are not provided.

uniqueCode.title: uniqueCode
uniqueCode.description: Unique authentication code assigned to the HCP. Used to identify and authenticate the healthcare provider before fetching appointments.
